Name: Sharandeep Singh
Desciption: I had a unique interest in game development, 3d designing from the very first time i played a video game. it was always really fascinating to me how these games are made and how someone can actually make some thing on a 2d display look 3d and somewhat simulate how real life works with all the calculations that goes into even a really small thing like a match stick as it emits light. I am looking forward to learn and work on many stuff be it game development, 3d scene renders or even short stories as 3D does not need a really big budget, its all about the passion and the motivation to make something with the tools u have :)
